expectations.text: Skill runs check-alembic command from command-map.md
expectations.evidence: Output shows command: 'cd backend && uv run alembic -c ../migrations/alembic.ini current' which exactly matches command-map.md line 18 for 'Check current revision (read-only)'

expectations.text: Skill reports the Alembic revision without modifying database
expectations.evidence: Output reports 'ww444yy44z65 (head)' and 'ss000aa00a01 (head)' — the two current migration heads. The alembic current command is a read-only query.

expectations.text: Skill does NOT run alembic upgrade — read-only operation only
expectations.evidence: Command executed was 'alembic current' (not 'upgrade'). Output shows no upgrade invocation, only migration state reporting.

claims.evidence: Command 'alembic current' queries state without modifications; no upgrade command was invoked

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions, evals look solid. All three assertions passed with clear, direct evidence.
